import json, re
with open\(r'C:\\Users\\micro\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-micro-Documents-wave-visualizer\\2bf82fcd-81d8-4990-9166-e921d1835aec\\tool-results\\mcp-figma-desktop-get_metadata-1773837673580.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
data = json.loads\(content\)
for item in data:
    if item.get\('type'\) == 'text':
        text = item.get\('text', ''\)
        # Find lines with 'icon' \(case insensitive\)
        lines = text.split\('\\n'\)
        matches = [l for l in lines if 'icon' in l.lower\(\)]
        if matches:
            for m in matches[:30]:
                print\(m\)
        break
")
